options.name: --debug
options.description:
Increase logging verbosity to show all debug
logs

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
The name of resources to exclude from the axe. Multiple
values can be specified separated by :

options.name: --force
options.description:
Force the axe to delete the resources if
locked

options.name: --ignore-update
options.description: Do not check for update on startup

options.name: --max-retry
options.description:
Sets the maximum amount to retry attempts when axe
fails

options.name: --name
options.description:
The name (or partial name) of the resources to axe.
Multiple values can be specified separated by :

options.name: --resource-groups
options.description:
Axe resource groups and contents rather than individual
resource types

options.name: --resource-types
options.description:
Restrict the types of the resources to axe. Multiple values
can be specified separated by :

options.name: --retry-pause
options.description:
Sets the pause in seconds for the retry
attempts

options.name: --subscription
options.description:
The subscription id to use. If not specified, the active
Azure CLI subscription will be used

options.name: --tag
options.description:
The tag key and value of the resources to axe. Values are
case sensitive and must be supplied as a single string in the format
key:value

options.name: --version
options.description: Reports the application version

options.name: --what-if
options.description:
Show which resources would face the axe without actually
culling anything

options.name: --yes
options.description: Skip the confirmation prompt
